title: ixeris pusilla
intro: Ixeris pusilla, also known as dwarf dandelion or small-flowered dandelion, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Ixeris pusilla include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and relieving symptoms of fever and rheumatism. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
